{{Infobox character
| name = Hallow Divide
| abilities = {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Combat Art]], [[Hallow Divide]]}}
| titles = {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Zenith Blade]]}}
| appears_in = The Last Horizon
| introduced = [[The Pilot (novel)|The Pilot]]
}}

''See also: [[Hallow Divide Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Hallow [[Divide]] is a sentient entity that manifests as a broad, shimmering silver [[sword]] with a straight blade. [[Forged]] from one piece of metal, he possesses the ability to hover and can project his presence or limbs into multiple locations simultaneously. Historically, he has been responsible for the burial of [[World Spirits]]. In combat, Hallow [[Divide]] can be used to execute complex maneuvers, such as creating cages of energy or carrying a user's [[Combat Art]]. He exhibits a sense of honor, expressing a reluctance to kill respected Combat Artists and offering them opportunities to surrender instead. While his exact whereabouts can be difficult to track, he is a powerful force capable of engaging divine entities and destroying advanced weaponry without causing the soul-corroding damage associated with certain technologies.}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|As a defensive [[Combat Art]] used by [[Omega’s daughter]], Hallow [[Divide]] is a weapon held by [[Aila Escalon]] that projects circular shields. This [[Zenith Device]], also known as the [[Zenith Blade]], has buried [[World Spirits]] and exists in a state where other copies have disappeared. The entity manifests as a character projecting an orange digital face, declaring that strong [[Aether]] benefits the health of the galaxy and potentially possessing the power to sever contracts. While it serves as a territory where [[Horizon]] champions fight, [[Aila Escalon]] also utilizes it as a devastating technique to stop Shyrax's attack by creating a cage of orange slashes. This [[Combat Art]] may also have the capability to sustain other [[Combat Arts]].}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">14</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Hallow Divide]] is a weapon held by [[Aila Escalon]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c14">''The Pilot'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Hallow Divide]] is a defensive [[Combat Art]] used by [[Omega’s daughter]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c14" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Hallow Divide]] projects circular shields around [[Aila]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c14" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The other copies of [[Hallow Divide]] have disappeared.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c14" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Hallow Divide]] is a [[Zenith Device]] that has buried [[World Spirits]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c15">''The Pilot'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Hallow Divide]] is a character who projects a digital face from orange light.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c16">''The Pilot'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Hallow Divide]] may develop the ability to sever contracts.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c19">''The Pilot'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Hallow Divide]] is the [[Zenith Blade]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c23">''The Pilot'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Hallow Divide]] declares that a strong [[Aether]] is good for the health of the galaxy.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Hallow Divide]] is a territory where the champions of [[Horizon]] fight.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c34">''The Pilot'', chapter 34</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Hallow Divide]] is a devastating [[Combat Art]] used by [[Aila Escalon]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c44">''The Pilot'', chapter 44</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Hallow Divide]] may be able to sustain [[Combat Arts]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c44" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Hallow Divide]] is a technique that can stop Shyrax's attack.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c45">''The Pilot'', chapter 45</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Hallow Divide]] is a technique used by [[Aila Escalon]] to create a cage of orange slashes.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c46">''The Pilot'', chapter 46</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|“A strong Aether is good for the health of the galaxy,” Hallow Divide declared.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c23" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
